title: Employment Objectives: Genetic Nondiscrimination
description: Conroe ISD does not use an employee's genetic information — such as family medical history or genetic test results — when making hiring, pay, or other employment decisions. Federal law protects workers and job applicants from discrimination based on their genetic makeup, and the district's practices reflect those protections. This helps ensure that all staff are evaluated fairly based on their qualifications and performance, not on personal health-related factors beyond their control.
